signals.name: Left front tyre pressure 2813 raw AB
signals.description: Ford TPMS cross-reference candidate. Header/module may differ on Everest; validate response and compare against dash tyre pressures.

signals.name: Left front tyre pressure 2813 psi candidate
signals.description: Experimental conversion based on Ford reference formula (((256*A)+B)/3+22/3)*0.145. Validate against dashboard TPMS before use.

signals.name: BCM battery voltage 4029
signals.description: Likely BCM-measured battery voltage. Compare with existing 402A and OBD adapter voltage.

signals.name: Battery state of charge 402C
signals.description: Likely Ford BCM smart-charging candidate. Validate against charging voltage/current behaviour.

signals.name: Alternator/generator load 402D
signals.description: Likely Ford BCM smart-charging candidate. Validate against charging voltage/current behaviour.

signals.name: Steering angle 3201 raw A
signals.description: Ford ABS cross-reference candidate. Test while slowly turning steering wheel lock-to-lock.

signals.name: Steering angle 3201 degrees candidate
signals.description: Experimental formula A*6.25 - 800 from Ford references. Confirm zero/centre and direction before use.

signals.name: Air flow rate from mass air flow sensor
signals.description: Generic SAE MAF airflow value. Useful diesel air-side signal if supported; added as mass air flow connectable/fallback.

signals.name: Low pressure fuel pump commanded duty cycle
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val * 0.0030517578.

signals.name: Accelerator pedal position
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Showed 0–4% during testing. Used as the practical throttle-position connectable on this diesel because generic throttle-position candidates were rejected.

signals.name: DPF pressure 0373 raw AB
signals.description: Candidate DPF pressure/differential pressure value. Ford references mention byte-position quirks; raw AB retained for analysis.

signals.name: DPF pressure 0373 kPa candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.01221 kPa. Expect low values at idle and rise with load/exhaust flow.

signals.name: Intake air temperature 2 03CA
signals.description: Candidate IAT2 / inter-stage / secondary intake temperature. Compare with F40F and 051C.

signals.name: High pressure fuel pressure desired
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val * 1.4503773969.

signals.description: Candidate inferred soot mass/concentration value. Some Ford references describe 0610 as inferred soot. Raw retained because byte offsets may vary.

signals.name: DPF soot inferred 0610 g/L candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw/100 g/L. Validate against soot/load behaviour and regen timing before trusting.

signals.name: DPF distance/counter 0614 raw AB
signals.description: Medium-confidence candidate from cross-source AI notes. Possible regen/distance/counter value; validate cautiously.

signals.name: DPF distance/counter 0614 div10 candidate
signals.description: Candidate raw/10 km interpretation. Include only for validation, not confirmed.

signals.name: DPF pressure 09E2 raw AB
signals.description: High-priority 2.0L Duratorq candidate from TalkFord-style packet captures. Raw value retained because scaling reports vary.

signals.name: DPF pressure 09E2 kPa div10
signals.description: Candidate formula raw/10 kPa. Validate against idle/load changes and compare with 0373/116C.

signals.name: DPF pressure 09E2 kPa div10.05
signals.description: Alternate community scaling raw/10.05 kPa. Kept for side-by-side validation.

signals.name: EGR valve duty 113C
signals.description: Ford 2.0L Duratorq EGR candidate. EGR should close/reduce during active regen and under high load.

signals.name: EGR valve actual 113D
signals.description: Ford 2.0L Duratorq EGR candidate. EGR should close/reduce during active regen and under high load.

signals.name: EGR valve desired 113E
signals.description: Ford 2.0L Duratorq EGR candidate. EGR should close/reduce during active regen and under high load.

signals.name: DPF pressure 116C raw AB
signals.description: Ford diesel cross-reference candidate for DPF pressure/differential pressure. Raw value retained for comparison.

signals.name: DPF pressure 116C psi candidate
signals.description: Experimental Ford-style scaling raw*0.03625 psi. Validate against EGT/load/regen state; may not represent DPF differential pressure on Everest.

signals.name: Barometric pressure 1441 raw AB
signals.description: Barometric pressure Ford extended candidate. Raw retained for pressure scaling validation.

signals.name: Barometric pressure 1441 kPa candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.25 kPa. Use BARO vs MAP delta to derive gauge boost.

signals.name: MAP absolute pressure 1442 raw AB
signals.description: MAP absolute pressure Ford extended candidate. Raw retained for pressure scaling validation.

signals.name: MAP absolute pressure 1442 kPa candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.25 kPa. Use BARO vs MAP delta to derive gauge boost.

signals.name: Exhaust back pressure 1445 raw AB
signals.description: Ford diesel cross-reference candidate for exhaust back pressure. Raw value included for validation.

signals.name: Exhaust back pressure 1445 psi candidate
signals.description: Experimental Ford-style scaling raw*0.03625 psi. May need BARO subtraction or different interpretation.

signals.name: EGR/exhaust back pressure 1445 kPa candidate
signals.description: Candidate EGR/exhaust backpressure scaling from Ford diesel references. Compare against load, MAP, DPF pressure.

signals.name: Injection quantity actual 1610
signals.description: Likely Ford diesel injection quantity candidate. Should rise with load/throttle.

signals.name: Injection quantity desired 1611
signals.description: Likely Ford diesel injection quantity candidate. Should rise with load/throttle.

signals.name: Injection timing actual 1612
signals.description: Likely injection timing candidate. Validate cautiously; timing may move during regen/load.

signals.name: Fuel rail pressure actual 1613 kPa candidate
signals.description: Likely Ford diesel common-rail pressure candidate. Idle sanity check should be roughly 30000–50000 kPa; full load much higher.

signals.name: Fuel rail pressure desired 1614 kPa candidate
signals.description: Likely Ford diesel common-rail pressure candidate. Idle sanity check should be roughly 30000–50000 kPa; full load much higher.

signals.name: Fuel volume regulator duty 1615
signals.description: Likely HP pump/fuel volume regulator duty cycle candidate. Validate against load and rail pressure.

signals.name: Fuel rail temperature
signals.description: High-confidence 2.0L Duratorq candidate. Example cross-source packets show 0x41/0x42 translating to mid-50°C using A-40.

signals.name: Boost desired 16C4 kPa candidate
signals.description: Likely Ford boost/VGT cluster candidate. Compare desired vs actual, MAP, throttle/load.

signals.name: Boost actual 16C5 kPa candidate
signals.description: Likely Ford boost/VGT cluster candidate. Compare desired vs actual, MAP, throttle/load.

signals.name: VGT/vane commanded 16C6 percent candidate
signals.description: Likely Ford VGT/vane position candidate. Watch commanded vs actual under throttle/load changes.

signals.name: VGT/vane actual 16C7 percent candidate
signals.description: Likely Ford VGT/vane position candidate. Watch commanded vs actual under throttle/load changes.

signals.name: Tyre size revolutions per mile
signals.description: High-confidence TalkFord-style 2.0L Duratorq candidate. Example 62 16 F0 03 33 = 819 rev/mile. Useful for tyre/speed calibration research.

signals.name: Engine load
signals.description: Working engine load percentage. Added as engine load connectable.

signals.name: Coolant temperature
signals.description: Working; matched built-in ECT.

signals.name: Manifold pressure
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula A*10000/68947.

signals.name: Engine speed
signals.description: Confirmed responding. Formula val / 4.

signals.name: Vehicle speed Ford extended raw
signals.description: Confirmed working Ford extended vehicle speed. Raw value reads about 4 km/h below dashboard; kept as raw speed connectable.

signals.name: Vehicle speed Ford extended corrected
signals.description: Ford extended vehicle speed with +4 km/h display correction to better match the dashboard. Use this as the practical speed connectable.

signals.name: Fuel remaining
signals.description: Working. Equation A*100/255.

signals.name: Engine oil temperature
signals.description: Working. Equation A-40. Added as engine oil temperature connectable.

signals.name: EGT11 post turbo / pre DOC F460 raw AB
signals.description: Ford/Ranger/Everest EGT candidate. Raw 16-bit retained for validation against existing EGT and regen behaviour.

signals.name: EGT11 post turbo / pre DOC F460 Celsius candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.1 - 40 °C. During regen, pre/post DPF sensors should climb sharply.

signals.name: EGT12 post DOC / pre DPF F461 raw AB
signals.description: Ford/Ranger/Everest EGT candidate. Raw 16-bit retained for validation against existing EGT and regen behaviour.

signals.name: EGT12 post DOC / pre DPF F461 Celsius candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.1 - 40 °C. During regen, pre/post DPF sensors should climb sharply.

signals.name: EGT13 post DPF F462 raw AB
signals.description: Ford/Ranger/Everest EGT candidate. Raw 16-bit retained for validation against existing EGT and regen behaviour.

signals.name: EGT13 post DPF F462 Celsius candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.1 - 40 °C. During regen, pre/post DPF sensors should climb sharply.

signals.name: EGRT EGR/manifold temp F463 raw AB
signals.description: Ford/Ranger/Everest EGT candidate. Raw 16-bit retained for validation against existing EGT and regen behaviour.

signals.name: EGRT EGR/manifold temp F463 Celsius candidate
signals.description: Candidate formula raw*0.1 - 40 °C. During regen, pre/post DPF sensors should climb sharply.

signals.name: Multi EGT F478 raw packet
signals.description: High-priority Ford diesel cross-reference candidate. Ford 6.7 references use this as a multi-EGT packet. Raw 64-bit capture is included because offset decoding needs validation in Pelican.

signals.name: Multi EGT F478 first word raw AB
signals.description: First 16-bit word of 22F478 for live-change validation. Compare against existing EGT pre-turbo 220569.

signals.name: DPF regen status F48B raw A
signals.description: High-priority Ford diesel cross-reference candidate. Watch for stable off value and clear change during active regen.

signals.name: DPF regen status F48B raw AB
signals.description: Raw 16-bit companion for 22F48B. Included because some references describe a bit flag in the second byte.

signals.name: DPF total regen count FD86 raw AB
signals.description: Likely regen-history cluster candidate. May represent total successful regen count. Validate by stability and long-term changes.

signals.name: DPF failed regen count FD87
signals.description: High-confidence Ford 2.0L Duratorq candidate. Packet examples suggest raw count of failed/incomplete regens.

signals.name: DPF ash/history FD88 raw A
signals.description: Likely FD8x regen-history cluster candidate. Possible ash/load/history value. Treat as experimental.

signals.name: DPF ash/history FD88 percent
signals.description: Candidate percent scaling for FD88. Validate only over long-term; ash values should not drop after regen.

signals.name: DPF average distance between regens raw
signals.description: High-confidence 2.0L Duratorq candidate. Raw value retained for sanity.

signals.name: DPF average distance between regens
signals.description: Candidate/likely formula raw/10 km. Example cross-source packet 62FD891824 = 618.0 km.

signals.name: DPF distance since last regen raw
signals.description: High-confidence 2.0L Duratorq candidate. Raw value retained for sanity.

signals.name: DPF distance since last complete regen
signals.description: Candidate/likely formula raw/10 km. Example cross-source packet 62FD8A03FF = 102.3 km. Should reset after successful regen.

signals.name: TEST TCM Odd Responder 056F raw8 A
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E1. Raw first byte only; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: TEST TCM Odd Responder 056F raw16 AB
signals.description: Targeted Service 22 PID hunt candidate from 7E1. Raw first two bytes; compare behaviour against known references before promoting.

signals.name: Torque converter slip speed
signals.description: Confirmed working torque converter slip RPM.

signals.name: Transmission fluid temperature Everest div16
signals.description: Promoted to primary Everest transmission-fluid-temperature candidate after Pelican drive comparison. Same 7E1 221E1C TCM response as the 5/72 value; div16 warm-up and operating range looked more plausible against coolant, oil temperature, speed/load, and normal 10-speed behaviour. Validate against FORScan/factory scan data when available.

signals.name: Transmission fluid temperature 5/72 compare
signals.description: Comparison/legacy scaling for the same 7E1 221E1C TCM response. Kept for validation only; current Pelican drive comparison suggests this reads lower than expected, so div16 is now the preferred active Everest transmission-temperature candidate.

signals.name: Transmission gear engaged
signals.description: Working; tested 1 and 9. Added as a connectable candidate for transmission gear display if supported by Pelican.

signals.name: Torque converter slip 1E20 signed candidate
signals.description: Speculative TCC slip candidate from external references. Compare against existing confirmed 1E14 torque-converter slip.

signals.name: Transmission line pressure desired 1E30
signals.description: Speculative 10R line-pressure target candidate. Should vary with throttle, shift events, and gear.
